introSection: Shenzhou Coaster was a steel inverted roller coaster located at Beijing Shijingshan Amusement Park in Shijingshan, Beijing, China. It was a prototype Suspended Loop Coaster installation from Beijing Shibaolai Amusement Equipment. It operated from 2005 to 2019 and remained standing until 2023, when it was removed.
fullText: Shenzhou Coaster was a steel inverted roller coaster located at Beijing Shijingshan Amusement Park in Shijingshan, Beijing, China. It was a prototype Suspended Loop Coaster installation from Beijing Shibaolai Amusement Equipment. It operated from 2005 to 2019 and remained standing until 2023, when it was removed.
